_description: Stroke risk prediction model. One-hot encoding for categorical fields is handled internally.

_field_notes.avg_glucose_level: Average blood glucose level in mg/dL (float)
_field_notes.smoking_status: never smoked | formerly smoked | smokes | Unknown (string)

_encoding_note: ever_married, work_type, and smoking_status are one-hot encoded internally. Only the values above are valid.
